---
name: Bug report
about: The skill misbehaved — wrong trigger, fabricated facts, flattened voice, or a scanner false positive
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the behavior you saw.

**What you expected**
What the skill should have done instead.

**Which failure is it?** (check any that apply)
- [ ] Triggered when it shouldn't have (code, data, legal, changelog, chat)
- [ ] Didn't trigger when it should have
- [ ] Invented or strengthened a fact (number, name, testimonial, claim)
- [ ] Flattened a provided voice / brand sample
- [ ] Left process bleed or wrapper text in the output
- [ ] Scanner false positive / false negative

**Reproduction**
The prompt and input you used (redact anything private). If it's the scanner,
include the draft text or a minimal snippet.

**Environment**
- Where you ran it (Claude Code / app / API):
- Model (Sonnet / Opus / other):
